asset_policy: Use assets/items as the canonical 26-image component pack. Screens and references remain high-level visual references.

screens.title: Main concept sheet
screens.purpose: Primary visual overview showing the three-screen MVP loop.

screens.title: Product concept sheet
screens.purpose: Expanded product and gameplay pillars overview.

screens.title: Adventure map screen
screens.purpose: Full-screen reference for the map scene.

screens.title: Lesson / question screen
screens.purpose: Full-screen reference for the place-value lesson scene.

screens.title: Reward / completion screen
screens.purpose: Full-screen reference for the bridge repaired reward scene.

references.purpose: Approved palette, states, and color usage reference.
Mascot poses, facial expressions, costume, silhouette, and accessory reference.
Buttons, answer tiles, progress, badges, nav, audio, and reward components.
Map regions, world elements, node examples, and art direction notes.

items.description: Cream answer-card panel with a glossy orange border and rounded rectangle shape.
items.purpose: Reusable answer choice card or lightweight content panel.
items.recommended_usage: Use as a neutral/secondary answer tile state, especially for orange option styling.
items.alt_text: Rounded cream answer card with orange border
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Glossy blue-and-white bottom navigation strip with three empty circular icon slots and star accents.
items.purpose: Base navigation bar background for Quests, Practice, and Shop.
items.recommended_usage: Layer nav icons or labels over the three circular slots.
items.alt_text: Blue bottom navigation strip with three icon slots
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Wooden bridge connected to a curved dirt path with stones, grass, and flowers.
items.purpose: Map path segment and level transition visual.
items.recommended_usage: Use around map node 26 or any repaired-bridge progression moment.
items.alt_text: Wooden bridge leading into a grassy path
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Large soft pastel cloud cluster with warm highlights and pale blue shadows.
items.purpose: Sky decoration for map and lesson backgrounds.
items.recommended_usage: Use as a large background cloud behind floating islands or UI panels.
items.alt_text: Large soft white cloud
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Wide fluffy cloud group with layered soft white and lavender-blue shading.
items.purpose: Secondary sky decoration and atmospheric filler.
items.recommended_usage: Use at screen edges or behind map elements to create depth.
items.alt_text: Wide fluffy cloud group
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Vertical sunny landscape with blue sky, clouds, flowers, green hills, and a winding path.
items.purpose: Daytime adventure or lesson background.
items.recommended_usage: Use behind map/lesson UI when a calm outdoor learning scene is needed.
items.alt_text: Sunny path through green hills under a blue sky
items.background_removal_note: Full-screen scene background; kept opaque to preserve the artwork.

items.description: Floating meadow island with trees, flowers, a small pond, and a curved dirt path.
items.purpose: Number Meadow or general adventure map island module.
items.recommended_usage: Place as a map region or decorative floating-world chunk.
items.alt_text: Floating grassy island with trees, flowers, pond, and path
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Floating island with waterfall, pond, trees, flowers, rocks, and trail path.
items.purpose: Fraction Lagoon or magical map region module.
items.recommended_usage: Use as a more dramatic island region near water-themed lessons.
items.alt_text: Floating island with waterfall and path
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Happy fox mascot jumping with both arms raised in celebration.
items.purpose: Celebration pose for correct answers, rewards, and success states.
items.recommended_usage: Use on reward screens or after the learner answers correctly.
items.alt_text: Happy fox mascot jumping in celebration
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Smiling fox mascot pointing upward with one finger, wearing the blue wizard-adventure outfit.
items.purpose: Guide pose for hints, onboarding, or drawing attention to a UI element.
items.recommended_usage: Use beside tutorial callouts or hint messages.
items.alt_text: Smiling fox mascot pointing upward
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Fox mascot in a thoughtful pose with one paw at the chin and eyes looking upward.
items.purpose: Thinking or problem-solving support state.
items.recommended_usage: Use when presenting a hint, explanation, or reflective prompt.
items.alt_text: Fox mascot thinking with paw on chin
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Fox mascot with a worried or concerned expression and hands held together.
items.purpose: Gentle retry, low-confidence, or mistake recovery state.
items.recommended_usage: Use after an incorrect answer with supportive copy.
items.alt_text: Worried fox mascot standing with hands together
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Vertical fantasy sky landscape with mountains, floating islands, clouds, and a winding path.
items.purpose: Lesson or transition background with more magical depth than the simple day path.
items.recommended_usage: Use behind lesson panels or map transitions.
items.alt_text: Fantasy sky landscape with mountains and floating islands
items.background_removal_note: Full-screen scene background; kept opaque to preserve the artwork.

items.description: Round blue magical portal with gold ring, glowing cyan center, and gem accents.
items.purpose: Transition effect, unlock portal, or special lesson entry marker.
items.recommended_usage: Use when entering a lesson, opening a new world, or showing magical travel.
items.alt_text: Blue magic portal with gold ring
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Blank glossy blue circular map node with a pale star shape in the center.
items.purpose: Available or empty map node state.
items.recommended_usage: Use for future nodes before a number label or stars are applied.
items.alt_text: Blank blue circular map node
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Green-blue gem-like completed map node with a central gold star and three smaller stars underneath.
items.purpose: Completed or mastered map node state.
items.recommended_usage: Use for completed lessons or mastered path nodes.
items.alt_text: Completed map node with three stars
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Blue stone circular locked node with silver padlock and gem accents.
items.purpose: Locked map node state.
items.recommended_usage: Use for unavailable future levels.
items.alt_text: Locked blue circular map node with padlock
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Round gold-framed icon showing an open math notebook with a pencil and plus/multiply symbols.
items.purpose: Practice tab icon.
items.recommended_usage: Use in the bottom navigation for practice mode.
items.alt_text: Practice icon with notebook and pencil
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Blue quest book with gold star and small parchment map.
items.purpose: Quests tab icon.
items.recommended_usage: Use in the bottom navigation for quests or missions.
items.alt_text: Quest book icon with star and parchment
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Round shop icon with a blue storefront, striped awning, and star badge.
items.purpose: Shop tab icon.
items.recommended_usage: Use in the bottom navigation for the shop screen.
items.alt_text: Shop storefront icon with blue awning and star
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Vertical magical night-sky scene with stars, purple-blue sky, glowing path, and distant fantasy scenery.
items.purpose: Reward/completion screen background.
items.recommended_usage: Use behind reward stars, XP, and celebration UI.
items.alt_text: Magical starry night reward background
items.background_removal_note: Full-screen scene background; kept opaque to preserve the artwork.

items.description: Glossy gold ribbon banner with a central gem and curled ribbon ends.
items.purpose: Title banner or reward label component.
items.recommended_usage: Use for positive titles, reward headings, or section headers.
items.alt_text: Gold ribbon banner
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Colorful sparkle burst with golden center, cyan/purple swirls, small stars, and particles.
items.purpose: Celebration particle effect.
items.recommended_usage: Use when awarding stars, XP, or correct-answer feedback.
items.alt_text: Colorful sparkle particle burst
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Large glossy filled gold star with highlights and bright dimensional shading.
items.purpose: Earned star, reward, or completed-star state.
items.recommended_usage: Use for earned stars on reward screens and completed map nodes.
items.alt_text: Filled gold reward star
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Gold-outlined empty star with pale cream interior.
items.purpose: Unearned star or empty reward state.
items.recommended_usage: Use for star slots that have not been earned yet.
items.alt_text: Empty gold outlined star
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

items.description: Glossy blue-and-gold badge with a gold star and text '+60 XP'.
items.purpose: Reward badge for 60 XP completion payout.
items.recommended_usage: Use on reward screen after the learner completes node 26.
items.alt_text: Plus sixty XP badge with gold star
items.background_removal_note: Blank outer background removed; subject preserved with soft alpha edge.

background_removal.method: local edge-connected background flood fill with soft alpha; full-screen background assets kept opaque
background_removal.notes: Most item images now have transparent PNG backgrounds. Background scene images keep opaque alpha because the scene itself is the background.
